issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The effect checks if your Leader has the {Impel Down} type, not if a card with that type is on board.
Action is missing the 'rest' component. Card text states 'add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it' — requires both GiveDon AND Rest actions.
